mapper.select: select schedule_code, schedule_enrol_start_date, schedule_enrol_end_date, schedule_start_date, schedule_start_date_add_date, JSON_EXTRACT(schedule_after_date, '$[0]') AS schedule_after_date, title, time, online, part_type, enrol_limit, enrol_count, my_enrol_status, schedule_status, schedule_group_num, program_code, from schedule s JOIN program p ON p.program_num = s.program_num ORDER BY schedule_start_date DESC
